generateAndDisplayQrCode() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeActivity
 
generatePromoCode() - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeService
Generates a human-readable promo code (e.g.
generatePromoCode_eachPartInRange100To999() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
Implementation uses 100–999 per part; ensure no off-by-one or wrong range.
generatePromoCode_matchesFormatThreeDigitsSpaceThreeDigits() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
Documented format is "ddd ddd" (e.g.
generatePromoCode_returnsNonEmpty() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
Promo code is shown in UI and used for manual entry; must never be null or empty.
generateQrCodeBitmap(String) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeService
Generates a QR code bitmap for the given event ID.
generateQrCodeBitmap_emptyString_returnsNull() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
Empty string is invalid; service should return null rather than generate garbage.
generateQrCodeBitmap_nullInput_returnsNull() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeServiceTest
Defensive: null input must not crash; caller (e.g.
geocodeAddressThenUpdateMap(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.GeolocationFragment
Geocode the address string to get latitude/longitude, then update the map on the main thread.

getFullName() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Entrant
Display name; "Unknown Entrant" if name is null or blank.
getFullName() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Display name: firstName + lastName, else displayName, else "Organizer".
getFullName_fallsBackToDisplayNameWhenFirstLastEmpty() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerTest
When first/last are empty, show displayName (e.g.
getFullName_prefersFirstAndLastName() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerTest
Display name for events: primary is firstName + " " + lastName.
getFullName_returnsOrganizerWhenAllEmpty() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerTest
Last fallback so UI never shows a blank name.
getFullName_trimsWhitespace() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantTest
Display should not show leading/trailing spaces from input.
getFullName_whenNameEmpty_returnsUnknownEntrant() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantTest
Empty name is treated as "no name" for display.
getFullName_whenNameNull_returnsUnknownEntrant() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantTest
Avoid null/blank in UI; show a safe default.
getFullName_whenNameSet_returnsName() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantTest
Normal case: display name is the stored name.
